```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1.2fr;gap:0.7em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.95em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);border-top:3px solid #2C8475;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.45em;">
    <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.4em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E5F2EE,#C8E6C9);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="package" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-size:0.72em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;">Plugins</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;">~10%</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">bundled sets via <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#2C8475;font-size:0.95em;">/plugin</code></div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.95em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);border-top:3px solid #C4881A;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.45em;">
    <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.4em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FEF5E7,#FAE9C8);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#C4881A;"><i data-lucide="sparkles" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-size:0.72em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;">Curated sets</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;">~20%</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">tw93's <strong style="color:#C4881A;">Waza</strong></div>
  </div>

  <div style="position:relative;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#F4F2FB,#EEEDF8);border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.95em;text-align:left;border:2px solid #5654A2;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(86,84,162,0.18);">
   <div style="position:absolute;top:-0.7em;right:0.7em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#5654A2,#3F3D7E);color:#F8F7F0;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.4em;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">★ most used</div>
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.45em;margin-top:0.2em;">
    <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.4em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#5654A2,#7B2CBF);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#F8F7F0;"><i data-lucide="user-round" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-size:0.72em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;">Your own</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#5654A2;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;font-weight:700;">60–80%</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">grow with usage · dominate after months</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.85em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.06em;">
  share of daily use, after a few months
 </div>

</div>
```
